result:
**Goal: Add a Wildfire Spread & Firefighting Simulation mode.**

A Rothermel-inspired fire propagation model on heterogeneous terrain with elevation, wind fields, multiple fuel types (grass/shrub/timber/urban), slope-driven acceleration, ember spotting for long-range ignition, smoke plume visualization, and active firefighting agents (firebreaks, water drops). This is fundamentally different from the existing Forest Fire mode (a simple percolation CA) — it models real fire physics with continuous intensity, crown fire transitions, and fuel moisture dynamics. Six presets: Grassland Brushfire, Mountain Wildfire, Urban-Wildland Interface, Prescribed Burn, Firestorm, and Canyon Wind Event.

Shall I build it?
